props.ChoiceText: An image came to you too quickly and too completely to feel entirely like craft.
props.ChoiceBio: A strange inspiration left you wondering whether beauty had used you rather than the reverse.

0.TransitionText: Because a strange inspiration left you wondering whether beauty had used you rather than the reverse, beauty, patronage, and display remained your proper world.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Artist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a strange inspiration left you wondering whether beauty had used you rather than the reverse, inspiration drifted past beauty and into stranger mysteries.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a strange inspiration left you wondering whether beauty had used you rather than the reverse, art and favor became impossible to separate.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.
